programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Against Nature (Tim Samaras, David A. Johnston, George Mallory)
programme.desc: Nature is powerful and can snuff out life in an instant, but for three intrepid adventurers, nature holds mysteries just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Two bodies are discovered near the town of Weerdinger, Netherlands; locals jump to conclusions that the two bodies belong to a man and woman united in life and death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: In a Danish bog, hundreds of mutilated ancient bones are found, while a mysterious deserted island belonging to Russia is explored.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: An earthquake in 2018 seems to have led an increase in UFO sightings in Alaska; do the extraterrestrials have something to protect here?

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Harboring resentment towards his father, Pasi hopes that traveling with him to native Tonga will provide a way for the two to make peace with their turbulent past.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Knowing little of her Japanese heritage, Lacey travels to Japan with her father to reconnect with the sights, sounds, and flavors of his childhood.

programme.title: Digital Tsunami: Big Tech, Big AI, Big Brother
programme.desc: This documentary will examine how toxic elements of digital environment are dramatically transforming society in negative ways, just as the prophetic, popular futurist Marshall McLuhan predicted 60 years ago. Examining the unforeseen social and political problems caused by the digital revolution, and highlight the need for laws and regulations to protect citizens, especially the most vulnerable.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Jay scrounges for games in Toronto and Mississauga and battles a downward swing in momentum.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: In a Danish bog, hundreds of mutilated ancient bones are found, while a mysterious deserted island belonging to Russia is explored.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: Six gliders drop from the skies near Cabourg in a surprise attack to take Pegasus Bridge over the One River; securing the bridge is a crucial step in protecting a north flank invasion.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.sub-title: If You Sink It, They Will Come
programme.desc: When historically low water levels in Texas begin to reveal intentionally sunken ships from World War One, Justin and Mike take a trip to the Lone Star State. What they find is a mystery that predates the war and sends Toban to a local museum for help.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: A pseudoscientific theory embraced by the Nazis claimed their Aryan ancestors had sought refuge in the Himalayas during a mythical cataclysmic ice age.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Buddhism focuses on the understanding that to live is to suffer; Buddhist practices aspire to transcend this state of suffering and achieve true understanding; traversing sacred sites and learning about ancient practices that guide followers.

programme.title: To Kill a Dictator
programme.desc: Cuba's Fidel Castro leads a revolution against a U.S.-backed dictator; the U.S., fearing the spread of communism, authorizes the CIA to remove Castro through various covert operations; Castro remains in power, defying U.S. efforts for decades.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A woman experiences multiple near death experiences in her lifetime, often returning to the place she calls heaven. Meanwhile, a man dies mid-workout and it takes 6 minutes to restart his heart when he experiences an extra dimensional place.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: In a Danish bog, hundreds of mutilated ancient bones are found, while a mysterious deserted island belonging to Russia is explored.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: Six gliders drop from the skies near Cabourg in a surprise attack to take Pegasus Bridge over the One River; securing the bridge is a crucial step in protecting a north flank invasion.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.sub-title: If You Sink It, They Will Come
programme.desc: When historically low water levels in Texas begin to reveal intentionally sunken ships from World War One, Justin and Mike take a trip to the Lone Star State. What they find is a mystery that predates the war and sends Toban to a local museum for help.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: A pseudoscientific theory embraced by the Nazis claimed their Aryan ancestors had sought refuge in the Himalayas during a mythical cataclysmic ice age.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Buddhism focuses on the understanding that to live is to suffer; Buddhist practices aspire to transcend this state of suffering and achieve true understanding; traversing sacred sites and learning about ancient practices that guide followers.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Slovakia: My Mom, the Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Simona returns to Slovakia, a country she left during a time of oppression, with her daughter, Vivian; they explore their Slovak heritage and Vivian learns about the sacrifices Simona made when she fled Slovakia over 20 years earlier.

programme.title: To Kill a Dictator
programme.desc: Cuba's Fidel Castro leads a revolution against a U.S.-backed dictator; the U.S., fearing the spread of communism, authorizes the CIA to remove Castro through various covert operations; Castro remains in power, defying U.S. efforts for decades.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Slovakia: My Mom, the Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Simona returns to Slovakia, a country she left during a time of oppression, with her daughter, Vivian; they explore their Slovak heritage and Vivian learns about the sacrifices Simona made when she fled Slovakia over 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.sub-title: If You Sink It, They Will Come
programme.desc: When historically low water levels in Texas begin to reveal intentionally sunken ships from World War One, Justin and Mike take a trip to the Lone Star State. What they find is a mystery that predates the war and sends Toban to a local museum for help.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Buddhism focuses on the understanding that to live is to suffer; Buddhist practices aspire to transcend this state of suffering and achieve true understanding; traversing sacred sites and learning about ancient practices that guide followers.

programme.title: To Kill a Dictator
programme.desc: Cuba's Fidel Castro leads a revolution against a U.S.-backed dictator; the U.S., fearing the spread of communism, authorizes the CIA to remove Castro through various covert operations; Castro remains in power, defying U.S. efforts for decades.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: A pseudoscientific theory embraced by the Nazis claimed their Aryan ancestors had sought refuge in the Himalayas during a mythical cataclysmic ice age.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A woman experiences multiple near death experiences in her lifetime, often returning to the place she calls heaven. Meanwhile, a man dies mid-workout and it takes 6 minutes to restart his heart when he experiences an extra dimensional place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Two bodies are discovered near the town of Weerdinger, Netherlands; locals jump to conclusions that the two bodies belong to a man and woman united in life and death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: A strange formation is seen in the sky over the suburbs of Tinley Park; the lights return the following year; annually, Illinois receives reports of over 300 UFO sightings, so why are the Tinley Park sightings the only ones that happen en masse?

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: A strange formation is seen in the sky over the suburbs of Tinley Park; the lights return the following year; annually, Illinois receives reports of over 300 UFO sightings, so why are the Tinley Park sightings the only ones that happen en masse?

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Two bodies are discovered near the town of Weerdinger, Netherlands; locals jump to conclusions that the two bodies belong to a man and woman united in life and death.

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.title: Digital Tsunami: Big Tech, Big AI, Big Brother
programme.desc: This documentary will examine how toxic elements of digital environment are dramatically transforming society in negative ways, just as the prophetic, popular futurist Marshall McLuhan predicted 60 years ago. Examining the unforeseen social and political problems caused by the digital revolution, and highlight the need for laws and regulations to protect citizens, especially the most vulnerable.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Kingdom of Cults, Presidents Death, Sacred Chickens
programme.desc: A prophecy born on a mountainside ignites the ambitions of a controversial figure, an eerie prediction of inclement weather launches a woman into the spotlight, and the fate of empires hangs in the balance as Romans await the pecks of chickens.

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Kingdom of Cults, Presidents Death, Sacred Chickens
programme.desc: A prophecy born on a mountainside ignites the ambitions of a controversial figure, an eerie prediction of inclement weather launches a woman into the spotlight, and the fate of empires hangs in the balance as Romans await the pecks of chickens.
